iframes.style: position: fixed; display: none; z-index: 9998; border: var(--mgpt-iframe-border); border-radius: var(--mgpt-radius); box-shadow: var(--mgpt-shadow); width: calc(100% - 40px); height: 70%; bottom: 75px; left: 20px; right: 20px;

position: fixed; border: 1px solid rgb(226, 226, 226); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 4px 8px; z-index: 9998; display: none; width: calc(100% - 40px); height: 70%; bottom: 75px; left: 20px; right: 20px;
